1.description: discover columns of fylke table to identify name and geometry columns for Finnmark

2.description: select the Finnmark county row and its geometry (omrade)

3.description: select all municipalities with their kommunenummer and geometry

4.description: find municipalities that intersect the Finnmark geometry (municipalities in Finnmark)

5.description: select buildings located in the municipalities in Finnmark (filter by kommunenummer)

6.description: select flood polygons for the 200-year return period, limited to Finnmark extent

7.description: find buildings that intersect the 200-year flood polygons

9.description: sort municipalities by building count descending
